questions.query: Which clean draft paper should be consulted for review background on allene catalytic asymmetric synthesis and natural product syntheses?
questions.expected_reason: F3I is the designated overview/framing paper in the clean draft pack.

questions.query: Which paper supports palladium-catalyzed asymmetric synthesis of axially chiral allenes with dibenzalacetone and high enantioselectivity?
questions.expected_reason: F47A carries the method/application role in the clean draft data.

questions.query: Which paper discusses secondary phosphine oxide asymmetric allenylation with enyne-type propargylic carbamates?
questions.expected_reason: P403 is the secondary phosphine oxide allenylation clean draft record.

questions.query: Which selected paper represents recent progress in Pd-catalyzed asymmetric allenylation chemistry?
questions.expected_reason: P403 has the recent_progress role and Pd-catalyzed allenylation title signal.

questions.query: Which record has useful figure or scheme evidence for a reaction scheme involving secondary phosphine oxides?
questions.expected_reason: P403 has the figure note about a reaction scheme for secondary phosphine oxides.

questions.query: Which papers should be compared for broad review framing versus palladium axially chiral allene method detail?
questions.expected_reason: F3I covers the broad framing and F47A covers a representative palladium method.

questions.query: Which item should be treated as a limitation or human-review warning before relying on its metadata?
questions.expected_reason: P403 retains source and metadata warnings for human review.

questions.query: Which retrieved item has a DOI or bibliographic caveat with missing authors or DOI warning?
questions.expected_reason: P403 preserves the DOI/authors caveat in the no-upload manifest warning.
